steps.title: Identify the blocking excess
steps.content: The phrase “too eager to see that others conformed to the proprieties to consider them herself” uses too to signal that Anika's excessive focus on enforcing rules on others prevented her from applying them to her own conduct.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Consider means take into account and follow — Anika was so driven to enforce the proprieties on others that she neglected to apply them to her own conduct.

The other choices—admire, decide about, or form opinions—do not fit this context of behavioral standards.

Her zealousness in monitoring others' compliance overshadowed her own adherence to the proprieties.

That is the correct answer.
